channel.title: Knowledge-Management on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Knowledge-Management on Arrans github.io

item.title: silverbulletmd/silverbullet
item.description: An open source personal productivity platform built on Markdown, turbo charged with the scripting power of Lua

item.title: basicmachines-co/basic-memory
item.description: AI conversations that actually remember. Never re-explain your project to your AI again. Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/tyvKNccgqN

item.title: oldany/dropmind
item.description: Self-hosted capture layer to save anything from anywhere.
